_comment: HDB hacking/build-wall rulebook (productized from pj-audit-0717 rounds 1-3, 6 verified cases). Rules are DATA: thresholds, claims, sources live here; matching logic per `kind` lives in the reno-hack workflow (.claude/skills/reno-hack) and agent/hacking tools. Every verdict is stage-1 conjecture pending HDB permit + on-site beam check.

verdict_tiers.can: ✅ 可拆 — passes all three gates
verdict_tiers.hard_no: ❌ 不可拆 — structural or soil-stack constraint
verdict_tiers.reroute: ⚠️ 可拆但需改道 — MEP work by licensed trade
verdict_tiers.red_light: 🔴 可拆但须重建/合规 — regulation forces rebuild or extra works

params.nonload_rc_pe_path: non-load-bearing RC elements (partition/party walls, stiffeners, lintols, hangers) are demolishable WITH permit + PE (civil/structural) supervision — treat as hard_no by default, flag the PE path only when the user insists; structural RC / shelter / facade remain absolute

rules.claim_template: {segment}: black solid ink = RC structural (BTO legend 'shall not be hacked'); thin double-line 100-170mm = brick partition, hackable with permit; beam check on site.
rules.basis: hdb_norm:structural — BTO plan legend states black walls/columns shall not be hacked; shelter is all-RC; moving windows violates facade rules

params.soil_stack_locator: infer stack corner from WC pan position (pan hugs the stack corner, usually a black RC/party-wall corner); pan must not move far from stack (relocation needs HDB approval)
params.sink_plumbing_wall: prefer_kept — a wall carrying sink supply/waste should stay in the kept set; if a door must be cut into it, use the segment away from the fixture runs and site-verify pipe routing first

rules.claim_template: {segment}: non-load-bearing ≠ hackable — check risers/water/electric/gas before demolition.
rules.basis: case:3qr-open v2 (BATH-kitchen dividing wall kept as sink-plumbing wall) + case:3qr-final (door cut into its upper segment away from sink runs)

params.enclosure_mandatory: HDB bathrooms/WCs must be enclosed (walls + door). Demolishing perimeter walls without re-enclosure = invalid plan.
params.enclosure_user_redrawable: the enclosure line is a DESIGN variable: user may redraw it (e.g. wrap lobby+WC+BATH along the refuse-chute line) as long as the result is closed + has a door; absorbed dry floor joins the wet zone
params.waterproofing: any wet-area wall/floor demolition breaks the membrane — redo floor waterproofing over the WHOLE enclosed zone (incl. absorbed dry areas) + wall turn-up: shower walls >=1800mm, others >=300mm; PUB licensed plumber
params.bto_age_note: flats under 3 years old: wet-area wall/floor hacking prohibited (waterproofing warranty)

rules.claim_template: wet zone {zone}: enclosure + waterproofing red lights apply; suggestions must include rebuild segments (built_segments) when perimeter is opened.

erection_no_permit.verdict: Permit Required? = No (HDB official Walls table — wall ERECTION is not an approval item)
conditions: adequate natural lighting + ventilation if creating a habitable room
fire escape route direct (bedroom door → main exit), not through another room
RC lintol over any opening (window/door) in hollow-block wall
only ONE layer of 63mm hollow block or 80mm glass block

demolition_permit_required.lightweight_partitions: Yes — demolition (partial or complete) or alteration of internal non-structural lightweight partition walls (hollow block/brick, drywall, ferrolite): up to underside of RC beam/slab only; brick top-down; drywall/ferrolite in full joint-to-joint; stop + inform HDB if steel bars found
demolition_permit_required.non_load_bearing_RC: Yes + Professional Engineer (civil/structural) must SUPERVISE the demolition and ensure repair of affected RC elements — non-load-bearing RC (partition walls, party walls, stiffeners, lintols, hangers) is demolishable with permit+PE, not an absolute hard_no

params.approval_time_optimization: since erection is not an approval item, the permit application's work list can carry ONLY the demolition items — blue walls on the submission plan are context, not approval scope, and do not add evaluation time. EXCEPTION: wet-area re-enclosure walls are bound into the bathroom works package (demolition approval is conditioned on re-enclosure + waterproofing) and cannot be split out.
params.wet_area_works: permit_required + PUB licensed plumber; newly built flats: 3-year restriction on removal of wall/floor finishes in bathrooms/toilets (official wording)

rules.claim_template: Permit trigger is DEMOLITION, never ERECTION: HDB's official Walls table lists all three new-wall types as 'Permit Required? No'.

params.yellow: demolish + erect new wall at the SAME location (auto-detect: built rect intersects a removal rect)
params.base: original floor plan (walls NOT whited out), overlays translucent, legend + notes strip mandatory

three_image_deliverable.1_base_fact: as-proposed updated floorplan (hacked+built, no colour) — new project baseline for fact layer / renders
three_image_deliverable.2_hdb_submission: approval-scope ONLY: demolition items + approval-bound rebuilds (wet-area enclosure); every item labelled W*/N* on-plan with a wall schedule (位置/类型/长度mm/厚度mm/动作) + per-item施工条件; permit-free erections EXCLUDED (one 免审批 note line); thickness MEASURED from plan ink

params.submission_audit_gates: S1 data-complete (per-wall dims mandatory — real submissions bounce on missing data) / S2 scope-exact (no permit-free wall leaks on) / S3 legend+title+dims+unit / S4 wet clauses / S5 id convention; validator = agent/hacking/submission_audit.py, exit-gated before publishing

rules.claim_template: HDB renovation-permit floor plan colour code: RED demolition / BLUE new / YELLOW same-spot rebuild — contractors submit this exact format.
rules.basis: hdb_norm:permit_floorplan_colour_code — HDB precinct renovation guidelines + MyNiceHome + user-reported real case: a submission was bounced for insufficient drawing data, stalling hacking approval — data table is mandatory

params.rule: on the interface between spaces being merged/opened, every segment that passes all gates is removed (doors included, per door-conflict rule); removing only part of the interface is an invalid plan (G5 machine gate: post-hack interface may contain only RC/columns/user-kept items, leftover thin ink <=60px)

rules.claim_template: goal interface '能拆都拆' — G5 maximal.

params.rule: a user ✗ applies ONLY to the marked sub-segment; never extrapolate to unmarked adjacent segments (interface-maximal is goal semantics, not a licence to grow marks); after finalizing the removal set, run a connectivity self-check: kept segments must not become island/unsupported walls
params.unmarked_suggestion_default: suggestion-tier built walls the user leaves unmarked in a build-wall round are accepted by default (state this in the report)

rules.claim_template: strict sub-segment mapping of image marks.
rules.basis: case:3qr-open v1 rejection (unmarked sink-plumbing wall wrongly removed)

params.kept: door + jambs enter kept set; G4 zero-intersection with removal rects
params.not_kept: decide by goal + enclosure: merged space with no privacy need → open area (remove door, no wall); remaining room still needs enclosure → brick up doorway (built_segments), extend new wall to nearest solid face (sparse jamb ink does not stop flood)

params.sliding_door_correction: if the user-drawn opening gives leaves under 700mm, widen it and report the correction (case: 4room-final 1120→1501mm)
params.half_wall_note: half-height lightweight partition: room modelled as enclosed in the fact layer with area_note semi-enclosed (open above ~1.1m)
params.enclosed_kitchen_gas: enclosing a kitchen with a gas stove requires ventilation compliance (mechanical exhaust / external window)
params.new_wall_material_default: lightweight: 63mm hollow block / 80mm glass block / gypsum partition — single layer only, erection needs NO permit (HDB Walls table)

rules.claim_template: built-segment component norms with auto-correction of undersized user-drawn openings.

params.g3_collar: leave ~250mm wall collar when removing walls abutting narrow black RC blocks (<11px), AND leave a ~3px collar when a NEW wall abuts black RC (detection-window overflow creates phantom columns); plug the flood slit with a short seal
params.build_full_span: new walls must land on solid faces at both ends — sparse jamb ink does not stop flood
params.threshold_lines: 75-DROP/threshold single lines are not walls: don't remove, exclude from G5 zones, erase-register in merged-room seeds but keep as floor-step facts
params.merged_room_dims: demote absorbed rooms' printed dims to derived with a provenance label (per-room reconciliation breaks otherwise)
params.r19_build_round: area delta bound extends to [-(built footprint+2sqft), removed footprint+2sqft]; rooms adjacent to built rects exempt from the unchanged-room check
params.stale_assets: after cloning a factlayer working dir, delete the previous cases' room assets before publishing

rules.claim_template: engineering pitfalls for the surgical-edit pipeline.
